potential_missing.source_sentence: This case study involves a simplified system of a coin-operated pay phone.

potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall enforce a minimum cost of 20 pence for a call.
The system shall check if the line is free or engaged before connecting the call.
The system shall allow the caller to hang up first.
The system shall deduct money as soon as the callee picks up the receiver and with each unit of time (UT) generated by the switchboard.
The system shall return any unused change after hanging up.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The pay phone uses up money as soon as the callee picks up the receiver and with each unit of time (UT) generated by the switchboard.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall deduct money as soon as the callee picks up the receiver and with each unit of time (UT) generated by the switchboard.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: After hanging up, any unused change is returned.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall return any unused change after hanging up.
